mermaid:
graph TD
    Client((Client)) -->|Ingress/HTTPS| LB[Cloud Load Balancer]
    
    subgraph "Security Perimeter: VPC Service Controls"
        subgraph "VPC: my-main-vpc"
            subgraph "Subnet: us-central1 / Firewall: allow-web-traffic"
                LB --> Frontend[Cloud Run: frontend]
                Frontend -->|Reads/Writes Profiles| DB[(Cloud SQL: postgres-db)]
            end
        end

        Frontend -->|Publishes Events| Async[Pub/Sub: events-topic]
    end
    
    style Frontend fill:#326ce5,stroke:#fff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style LB fill:#8b42f5,stroke:#fff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
